items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly validate the requirement of sharing scope controls. While the linked use case outlines the need for these controls, the prior steps do not demonstrate any checks or validations that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. Therefore, the assessment cannot definitively conclude whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
